question: Top 10 customers by total completed-order spending: show customer name, country, and total spent, highest first.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT c.name, c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS total_spent FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name, c.country ORDER BY total_spent DESC, c.name LIMIT 10", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT c.name, c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS total_spent FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name, c.country ORDER BY total_spent DESC, c.name LIMIT 10

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT c.name, c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS total_spent FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name, c.country ORDER BY total_spent DESC, c.name LIMIT 10
